390 PORT - Portuguese

PLSC481 Vegetation Assessment and Analysis (2 Credits)

An overview of vegetation assessment through the collection of data in the field (e.g. plots and transects) and the analysis of existing data and remotely detected images (e.g. Aerial photographs and GIS layers). Prerequisite: PLSC110 and PLSC111; or (BSCI160 and BSCI161); or permission of instructor.

Recommended: PLSC201, BSCI360, PLSC226, or PLSC471.
